# MEOK AI Labs — Revenue Battle Plan

## THE MISSION
Fund MEOK Labs humanoid robotics (HARVI) through MCP server revenue.
Align meok.ai (consumer AI OS) and csoai.org (enterprise governance) as complementary revenue engines.

---

## BRAND ALIGNMENT (No More Confusion)

```
MEOK AI Labs (parent company — MEOK AI LTD)
├── meok.ai — Consumer AI OS (companions, agents, gaming)
│   └── Revenue: Subscriptions £12-29/mo, Marketplace
├── csoai.org — Enterprise AI Governance (compliance, certification)
│   └── Revenue: MCP packs £9-999/mo, Consulting £5k-15k, Grants
└── HARVI — Humanoid Robotics (funded by above)
    └── Revenue: Future (hardware, licensing)
```

### How They Connect:
- meok.ai uses CSOAI's care membrane for safety
- csoai.org's MCP servers power meok.ai's compliance features  
- Both say "Built by MEOK AI Labs" in footer
- Cross-link: meok.ai/compliance → csoai.org, csoai.org/technology → meok.ai

### Who Pays What:
| Customer | Site | Products | Price Range |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| Developers | PyPI / GitHub | Individual MCP servers | Free (open source) |
| SME/Startup | csoai.org | MCP bundles, compliance kits | £9-79/mo |
| Enterprise | csoai.org | Full suite, assessments | £999/mo - £15,000 |
| Consumers | meok.ai | AI companion, Work OS | £12-29/mo |
| Government | csoai.org | Training, monitoring | Custom/grants |
